summary: Mutates selected object properties by replacing array values with copies that omit undefined entries while leaving other values untouched.
signature_intent: Normalize referenced property values in a mutable work list by compacting arrays in place on their owning objects.
behavior: Accepts a mutable list of property references.
Processes references from the end while more than one reference remains.
Replaces each referenced array value with a new array containing only defined entries.
Preserves all non-array referenced values unchanged.
Consumes each processed reference from the input list.
edge_cases: An empty or single-reference input list performs no changes.
Sparse array holes are removed because they behave as undefined entries.
Defined falsy values such as null, false, zero, and empty strings are preserved.
Invalid references can throw when the target property cannot be read.
forbidden_details: No source identifiers, repository names, paths, or implementation-specific names included.
